title: Kenya Restricts SACCO Lending Under Post-Covid Recovery Funds
summary: The EastAfrican reports on new government conditions affecting SACCO lending under World Bank-backed post-Covid recovery funds, including commentary from AVLC Global Consultants on guarantee requirements and SACCO access to credit..

title: World Bank Funding Feature Highlights SACCO-Led MSME Recovery
summary: The Star feature link supplied in the change request is included as part of the AVLC Global Consultants update set, reinforcing the wider World Bank-backed SACCO funding story and its role in expanding access to affordable capital.

title: Siraji Sacco Secures Ksh.170M Post-Covid World Bank Funding
summary: Citizen Digital reports that Siraji Sacco secured Ksh.170 million from the World Bank post-Covid recovery fund, with AVLC Global Consultants supporting the advisory, structuring, and funding arrangement process.

title: SACCOs Eye More Loans From Foreign-Based Lenders
summary: Business Daily reports that five SACCOs, including Siraji Sacco, signed financing arrangements worth about Sh1.3 billion through a transaction structured by AVLC, with disbursements expected across 2025 and 2026.

title: SACCOs Win Big in World Bank Post-Covid Recovery Plan
summary: The EastAfrican highlights SACCO participation in a World Bank-backed post-Covid recovery funding programme, noting AVLC's advisory role in helping selected local financial institutions access structured funding.
